# AGENTS.md — Nginx Mailer

## Project Overview

Lightweight nginx:alpine Docker image with built-in contact form API and SMTP email support.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/nginx-mailer](https://github.com/GeiserX/nginx-mailer)
- **Language:** Go
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Security

> **Do not commit secrets to the repository.**
> Use environment variables or secure vaults for credentials.
